title: Add Tauri Android mobile support foundation

acceptance_criteria.text: Initialize first-class Tauri Android support without introducing a PWA or alternate architecture.
Add documented Android development and build commands that follow the Tauri mobile CLI path.
Verify the Android app launches on an emulator or physical device and renders the SkillForge Academy shell.
Verify bundled certification content loads on Android for A+, Network+, and Security+ without network access.
Verify learner state persistence on Android for progress, notes, bookmarks, settings, and active track selection.
Make the core study flows usable on a phone-sized touch viewport: track switcher, dashboard, learning paths, practice, PBQ Lab, mock setup, flashcards, analytics, notes, and preferences.
Define and validate Android backup/export/import behavior under Android sandbox/storage rules, or explicitly record the platform blocker and mitigation.
Run the standard validation gates plus an Android build gate, documenting any host-machine dependency that prevents local execution.

source: User request: direct Tauri mobile support, Android first
